content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.41% with Bank Nifty -1.15% and PSU Bank -2.46% weighing, but IT +1.46% and individual stocks showing strong earnings-driven moves (COFORGE +16.9%, SRF +10.6%, POLYCAB +9%, BAJAJ-AUTO +6.7%). VIX +1.7% to 16.90 — modest risk-on but choppy. Book is 61% deployed with multiple positions in the green; focus is trailing SLs on winners and avoiding new cluster stacking late in session.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24100,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1068.30,
      "new_target": 1135.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "HOLD via micro-MODIFY check: stored SL 1068.30 already locks +8.6% gain, well below CMP 1083.60 with 1.4% gap — meets trail-gap discipline. No change needed; emitting HOLD via position_actions instead. Skipping MODIFY no-op."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive gold ETF hedge, -0.7% with SL 121.00 intact. Geopolitical hedge thesis still valid pending US NFP. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 822.00,
      "new_target": 855.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+1.7% with strong Q4 print and 2.7x volume; new ATH today. Trail SL from 820 (entry/breakeven) to 822 to lock minimal positive — gap to CMP 834 is 1.4%, meets 1% floor. Target unchanged toward MOFSL TP zone."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1341.52,
      "new_target": 1420.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+8.6% on Q4 + Cigniti merger blockbuster session. Stored SL 1341.52 already 1.8% below CMP 1366.20 — within trail-gap discipline floor. No-op MODIFY: emit HOLD via position_actions instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+1.1%, defense pack rallying. SL 3000 = 1.6% below CMP 3048.60 — adequate. Stock recovered intraday from low 3035; thesis intact, hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 825.00,
      "new_target": 875.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+4.0%, Q4 record-high revenue, near 52w high. Stored SL 825 already 1.6% below CMP 838 — within trail-gap floor. No-op; HOLD via position_actions."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Just entered today, -0.5%, Q4 +37% PAT thesis intact. SL 1465 = 1.2% below CMP 1483 — adequate. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Just entered today, -0.7%, Q4 turnaround +317% PAT thesis intact. SL 1580 = 1.6% below CMP 1605 — adequate. Hold to test 1740 target."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Just entered, +0.3%, Q4 PAT +10.6% with refrigerant capex visibility. SL 2755 = 1.4% below CMP 2790 — adequate."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.3%, Q4 record revenue and Rs 47/share dividend. SL 9020 = 0.8% below CMP 9093 — slightly under 1% trail floor but stored SL was set at entry, not a trailing operation; respect entry-time placement."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-1.3%, Q4 PAT -17% on Labour Codes one-off but revenue +18% and defence book strong. SL 1955 = 1.3% below CMP 1981 — adequate. Hold; thesis intact post one-time charge clarification."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "+0.1%, Q4 PAT +30.6%, all-time high zone. SL 354 = 2.8% below CMP 364.35 — adequate. Hold for Macquarie TP 415."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "-0.3% from entry but stock is +6.67% today on Q4 PAT +34% and Rs 12,000 buyback announcement. SL 10440 = 2.6% below CMP 10716 — adequate. Hold; buyback floor at 12,000 provides asymmetric upside."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1068.30,
      "reasoning": "Stored SL 1068.30 locks +8.6% gain, 1.4% below CMP — meets trail-gap discipline. No change."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 121.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, SL intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARICO",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 822.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock minimal positive after ATH break and +1.7% move."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COFORGE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1341.52,
      "reasoning": "SL already locks +6.5% gain, 1.8% below CMP — within trail-gap floor. Allow room for Q4-driven momentum to extend."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRSE",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 3000.00,
      "reasoning": "+1.1%, SL 1.6% below CMP. Defense thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "CAMS",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 825.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already locks +2.4% gain. Hold near 52w high."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PIDILITIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1465.00,
      "reasoning": "Same-day entry, thesis intact, SL adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "WOCKPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1580.00,
      "reasoning": "Same-day entry, Q4 turnaround thesis intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SRF",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 2755.00,
      "reasoning": "Same-day entry, SL adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POLYCAB",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 9020.00,
      "reasoning": "Same-day entry, record Q4."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BHARATFORG",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1955.00,
      "reasoning": "Same-day entry, Q4 weakness is one-off Labour Codes charge."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ABCAPITAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 354.00,
      "reasoning": "Same-day entry, Q4 PAT +30.6%."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BAJAJ-AUTO",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 10440.00,
      "reasoning": "Q4 +34% PAT and buyback at 12,000 announced today. Hold."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Strong Q4-driven moves visible across multiple names today — most have already been captured in the existing book (COFORGE, MARICO, SRF, POLYCAB, PIDILITIND, WOCKPHARMA, CAMS, ABCAPITAL, BHARATFORG, BAJAJ-AUTO). DABUR has an OPEN BUY at 487 from earlier — CMP 488.80, expecting fill or expiry; not stacking. LAURUSLABS BUY at 1226 also OPEN. GABRIEL +5.7% on 5.5x volume but Q4 board meeting May 13 (3 trading sessions away) — Rule 11 binary-event exclusion, NO_ACTION. THERMAX, NUVAMA, NBCC, FINCABLES not pursued — late in session (14:42, 47 min to close), 13 holdings already, deployment 61%, and adding more capital-goods/financials cluster names risks the cluster cap. Book is well-deployed with strong earnings tailwinds across positions; let trailing SLs and targets do the work.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Day 19, deployment 61%, cash buffer 39% (well above 20% floor). Today's P&L +1.36% with strong unrealized winners across the book driven by Q4 results in COFORGE, PNBHOUSING, MARICO, CAMS. Two pending OPEN orders (DABUR, LAURUSLABS) are within 1% of their LIMITs and may fill EOD — that would push deployment toward ~67%, still below soft 80% target but appropriate given late-session timing and binary-earnings density across the watchlist. Rule 18 audit: qualifying BULLISH watchlist names (DABUR +0.07, LAURUSLABS) already represented via OPEN orders; GABRIEL excluded by Rule 11 (May 13 board meeting). No fresh admits warranted at 14:42 IST."
}
